description: Fragment of an official document in Arabic script, possibly official correspondence or a petition. Mentions 'my master al-Qāḍī al-Saʿīd Ṣafiyy al-Mulk." (Al-Yāzūrī had a son with this laqab, also mentioned in T-S NS J570 (PGPID 26526).) Reused on recto for unidentified Hebrew text in rudimentary hand/spelling. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
